title: Welcome - Happiness Histogram
configuration: {"content": "Hi everyone! We're starting our retrospective with a Happiness Histogram. This is a great way to see how everyone is feeling about the work or the project in general."}

title: Rate Your Happiness
configuration: {"pattern": "RATING", "scale": {"min": 1, "max": 10, "step": 1}, "labels": ["Very Unhappy", "Very Happy"], "allowComment": true, "required": true}

title: Observe & Reflect
configuration: {"content": "Take a few moments to look at the histogram. Share one insight or observation from the results."}

title: Mad Sad Glad Board
configuration: {"content": "Think back on the last sprint. We'll explore different emotions we've felt recently—things that made us frustrated mad disappointed sad or happy glad."}

title: Add Your Sticky Notes
configuration: {"pattern": "CATEGORICAL", "categories": [{"id": "mad", "title": "Mad", "color": "#EF4444", "emoji": "😡"}, {"id": "sad", "title": "Sad", "color": "#3B82F6", "emoji": "😢"}, {"id": "glad", "title": "Glad", "color": "#10B981", "emoji": "😊"}], "allowMultiple": true, "maxLength": 200}

title: Cluster & Discuss
configuration: {"content": "Now let's look at what others have posted. Group similar notes into clusters and discuss the patterns we see."}

title: The Original Four
configuration: {"content": "We'll go through four classic questions that help us reflect on what's working what we've learned and where we can improve."}

title: What did we do well?
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What did we do well that if we didn't discuss we might forget?", "maxLength": 500, "allowMultiple": true}

title: What did we learn?
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What did we learn?", "maxLength": 500, "allowMultiple": true}

title: What should we do differently?
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What should we do differently next time?", "maxLength": 500, "allowMultiple": true}

title: What still puzzles us?
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What still puzzles us?", "maxLength": 500, "allowMultiple": true}

title: Summarize Key Points
configuration: {"content": "Let's summarize the key points we've discussed and identify any patterns or themes."}

title: Circle of Questions
configuration: {"content": "We'll do a Circle of Questions using a virtual board. Each person will answer a question and then post their own question for the next person."}

title: Answer & Ask
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "Answer the question above then ask your own question for the next person", "maxLength": 300, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Find Consensus
configuration: {"content": "Look for patterns and common themes in our questions and answers. Let's identify any consensus on actions to take."}

title: Feedback Door Smileys
configuration: {"content": "To wrap up let's do a quick feedback exercise to see how you felt about this retrospective session."}

title: Rate the Retrospective
configuration: {"pattern": "CATEGORICAL", "categories": [{"id": "happy", "title": "Happy", "color": "#10B981", "emoji": "😊"}, {"id": "neutral", "title": "Neutral", "color": "#6B7280", "emoji": "😐"}, {"id": "sad", "title": "Sad", "color": "#EF4444", "emoji": "😞"}], "allowMultiple": false, "maxLength": 100}

title: Closing Thoughts
configuration: {"content": "Thank you all for participating. Let's use what we've learned today to keep improving as a team!"}

title: Constellation Setup
configuration: {"content": "We'll create a constellation where you position yourselves based on how you feel about different aspects of our work."}

title: Position & Explain
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "Describe where you positioned yourself and why", "maxLength": 300, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Appreciative Inquiry
configuration: {"content": "Let's focus on what's working well and how we can build on our strengths."}

title: What's working best?
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What's working best in our team right now?", "maxLength": 400, "allowMultiple": true}

title: How can we do more?
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "How can we do more of what's working?", "maxLength": 400, "allowMultiple": true}

title: Build on Strengths
configuration: {"content": "Let's discuss how to amplify our strengths and successes."}

title: Five Whys
configuration: {"content": "We'll dig deep into a problem by asking 'why' five times to get to the root cause."}

title: Identify the Problem
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What problem should we explore?", "maxLength": 200, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Five Whys Analysis
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "Ask why five times to find the root cause", "maxLength": 1000, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Root Cause Solutions
configuration: {"content": "Now that we've found the root cause let's discuss solutions."}

title: Chaos Cocktail Party
configuration: {"content": "We'll have quick informal conversations in pairs about what's on our minds."}

title: Key Insights
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What was your key insight from the conversations?", "maxLength": 300, "allowMultiple": false}

title: AHA Moments
configuration: {"content": "Share any sudden realizations or insights you've had recently."}

title: Share Your AHA
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What was your AHA moment?", "maxLength": 200, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Positive & True
configuration: {"content": "We'll focus only on positive and true statements about our work and team."}

title: Positive Statements
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "Share something positive and true about our team or work", "maxLength": 300, "allowMultiple": true}

title: Celebrate Positives
configuration: {"content": "Let's celebrate these positive aspects of our team."}

title: Round of Admiration
configuration: {"content": "We'll go around and each person will share appreciation for someone else on the team."}

title: Express Appreciation
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "Share appreciation for a team member", "maxLength": 400, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Reflect on Appreciation
configuration: {"content": "How does it feel to give and receive this appreciation?"}

title: Outcome Expectations
configuration: {"content": "Let's align on what we expect to achieve from our upcoming work."}

title: Expected Outcomes
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What outcomes do you expect from our next sprint?", "maxLength": 300, "allowMultiple": true}

title: Align Expectations
configuration: {"content": "Let's discuss and align our expectations."}

title: Genie in a Bottle
configuration: {"content": "If a genie granted you three wishes to improve our team what would you wish for?"}

title: Make Your Wishes
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What are your three wishes for the team?", "maxLength": 500, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Discuss Wishes
configuration: {"content": "Which wishes resonate most with the team?"}

title: Learning Wish List
configuration: {"content": "What would you like to learn or improve in the coming period?"}

title: Learning Goals
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What do you want to learn or improve?", "maxLength": 400, "allowMultiple": true}

title: Support Learning
configuration: {"content": "How can we support each other's learning goals?"}

title: Analyse Stories
configuration: {"content": "Let's look at our recent work stories and analyze what we can learn from them."}

title: Story Analysis
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What can we learn from our recent stories?", "maxLength": 500, "allowMultiple": true}

title: Extract Lessons
configuration: {"content": "What are the key lessons from our story analysis?"}

title: Five Whys Deep Dive
configuration: {"content": "We'll dig deep into a problem by asking 'why' five times to get to the root cause."}

title: Problem Selection
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What problem should we explore deeply?", "maxLength": 200, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Why Analysis
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "Ask why five times to find the root cause", "maxLength": 1000, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Address Root Cause
configuration: {"content": "Now that we've found the root cause let's create an action plan."}

title: Learning Matrix
configuration: {"content": "We'll create a matrix of what we want to learn continue doing stop doing and start doing."}

title: Matrix Input
configuration: {"pattern": "CATEGORICAL", "categories": [{"id": "learn", "title": "Want to Learn", "color": "#8B5CF6", "emoji": "📚"}, {"id": "continue", "title": "Continue Doing", "color": "#10B981", "emoji": "✅"}, {"id": "stop", "title": "Stop Doing", "color": "#EF4444", "emoji": "🛑"}, {"id": "start", "title": "Start Doing", "color": "#3B82F6", "emoji": "🚀"}], "allowMultiple": true, "maxLength": 200}

title: Prioritize Actions
configuration: {"content": "Let's prioritize the most important items from our learning matrix."}

title: Perfection Game
configuration: {"content": "We'll rate our current performance and identify what would make it perfect."}

title: Rate Current Performance
configuration: {"pattern": "RATING", "scale": {"min": 1, "max": 10, "step": 1}, "labels": ["Poor", "Perfect"], "allowComment": true, "required": true}

title: Path to Perfection
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What would make our performance a 10?", "maxLength": 400, "allowMultiple": true}

title: Create Improvement Plan
configuration: {"content": "Let's create a plan to move closer to perfection."}

title: Remember the Future
configuration: {"content": "Imagine it's six months from now and we've had amazing success. What made that possible?"}

title: Future Success Story
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "Describe our success six months from now and what enabled it", "maxLength": 600, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Work Backwards
configuration: {"content": "Let's work backwards from that future success to create our action plan."}

title: Start Stop Keep
configuration: {"content": "We'll identify what to start doing stop doing and keep doing."}

title: Start Stop Keep Input
configuration: {"pattern": "CATEGORICAL", "categories": [{"id": "start", "title": "Start", "color": "#10B981", "emoji": "🚀"}, {"id": "stop", "title": "Stop", "color": "#EF4444", "emoji": "🛑"}, {"id": "keep", "title": "Keep", "color": "#3B82F6", "emoji": "✅"}], "allowMultiple": true, "maxLength": 200}

title: Prioritize Changes
configuration: {"content": "Let's prioritize which changes to implement first."}

title: Three by Three
configuration: {"content": "We'll identify three things that went well three things that could improve and three actions to take."}

title: Three by Three Input
configuration: {"pattern": "CATEGORICAL", "categories": [{"id": "well", "title": "Went Well", "color": "#10B981", "emoji": "👍"}, {"id": "improve", "title": "Could Improve", "color": "#F59E0B", "emoji": "💡"}, {"id": "action", "title": "Actions", "color": "#3B82F6", "emoji": "🎯"}], "allowMultiple": true, "maxLength": 200}

title: Action Planning
configuration: {"content": "Let's turn our improvement ideas into concrete actions."}

title: Smart Goals
configuration: {"content": "We'll create SMART goals (Specific Measurable Achievable Relevant Time-bound) for our improvement."}

title: Define SMART Goals
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "Create a SMART goal for team improvement", "maxLength": 500, "allowMultiple": true}

title: Commit to Goals
configuration: {"content": "Let's commit to specific SMART goals and assign ownership."}

title: ROTI
configuration: {"content": "Rate the Return On Time Invested for this retrospective."}

title: Rate ROTI
configuration: {"pattern": "RATING", "scale": {"min": 1, "max": 5, "step": 1}, "labels": ["Waste of Time", "Great Use of Time"], "allowComment": true, "required": true}

title: Improve Next Time
configuration: {"content": "How can we make the next retrospective even more valuable?"}

title: Smileys Feedback
configuration: {"content": "Use smileys to show how you feel about our team and work."}

title: Choose Your Smiley
configuration: {"pattern": "CATEGORICAL", "categories": [{"id": "happy", "title": "Happy", "color": "#10B981", "emoji": "😊"}, {"id": "neutral", "title": "Neutral", "color": "#6B7280", "emoji": "😐"}, {"id": "sad", "title": "Sad", "color": "#EF4444", "emoji": "😞"}], "allowMultiple": false, "maxLength": 100}

title: Take Aways
configuration: {"content": "What are your key takeaways from our time together?"}

title: Share Takeaways
configuration: {"pattern": "FREEFORM", "prompt": "What's your main takeaway?", "maxLength": 300, "allowMultiple": false}

title: Final Thoughts
configuration: {"content": "Any final thoughts before we wrap up?"}
